frame.coordinateSpace: modules snap to the spec-153 room tables (building-local); wall runs derive from the §3 extents and §4 doorway list, not from this file

Shell_Wall1m.snap: tile along X on zero-thickness shared wall planes

Shell_DoorFrame.snap: centre on each §4 doorway (1.6 m clear opening)

Shell_FloorTile.snap: 2 m grid, sink 0.08 so the walk surface is y=0

Shell_CeilingDuct2m.snap: raise to y=2.6 along corridor spines

Shell_FloorStripe1m.snap: wing accent line; runtime tints per wing hue

integration.note: Wall/door layout is generated by the withKookerHqCampus slice from spec 153 §3-§4; this pack only supplies the modules. Runtime wing tinting keeps geometry neutral. Yaw rotates local +Z about +Y.
